assertions.reason: `cargo test -q -p openai-agents --test root_export_parity --test docs_contract` exited 0 with root_export_parity (4/4) and docs_contract (3/3) passing. The `--list` captures name the relevant checks: `python_root_exports_are_surfaced_or_documented`, `documented_aliases_and_omissions_stay_live`, `facade_exposes_documented_namespace_modules`, `root_export_doc_describes_cross_crate_facade_surface`, and `parity_adjacent_docs_do_not_contain_machine_local_absolute_links`.

`docs_contract` passed with exit code 0, and the listed test `readme_describes_current_runtime_instead_of_bootstrap_scaffolding` confirms README/runtime alignment while the docs_contract target passed all 3 checks.

The assigned command set confirms facade export composition via `facade_exposes_documented_namespace_modules` and `root_export_doc_describes_cross_crate_facade_surface`, but it does not run the `runner_semantics` or `voice_semantics` tests named in the validation contract for VAL-CROSS-001, so the full cross-area assertion cannot be conclusively passed or failed strictly from these command results.

blockers.description: Assigned Cargo commands did not include `--test runner_semantics` or `--test voice_semantics`, which the validation contract requires for full VAL-CROSS-001 coverage.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: None; stayed within the exact command scope assigned by the parent task.

summary: Validated the assigned docs/facade Cargo surface: VAL-AUDIT-003 passed, VAL-AUDIT-004 passed, and VAL-CROSS-001 remains blocked because the assigned command set does not execute the additional contract tests required for full cross-area coverage.
